_comment: PreToolUse hook: Scan for hardcoded secrets before file writes

hooks.command: echo "$TOOL_INPUT_CONTENT" | grep -iE '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|sk_live_|sk_test_|password\s*=\s*["'\'''][^"'\''']|AKIA[A-Z0-9]{16})' && echo 'WARNING: Potential secret detected in file content. Review before committing.' || true

notes: Scans write content for common secret patterns: OpenAI keys, Stripe keys, AWS access keys, hardcoded passwords. Non-blocking warning.
